board_brief.title: Copilot Governance Readiness Brief
board_brief.positioning: AI Trust Infrastructure for regulated enterprises
board_brief.executive_summary: Generated by the runtime from signal, graph, workflow, policy, and audit events.
risk_findings: Copilot usage creates oversharing and evidence-readiness exposure.
Governance policy requires human review before publication or board use.
Audit replay is available for signal, graph, workflow, and approval events.
